name: Red Hot Molded Hearts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, dissolve the red hot candies in boiling water.
2. Stir in the dissolved candy mixture and stir in the strawberry gelatin until fully incorporated.
3. Gently fold in the applesauce to combine all ingredients smoothly.
4. Pour the mixture into 12 individual molds that have been oiled or into a heart-shaped mold (or a 1-quart bowl).
5. Chill for at least 3 hours before serving.
Yield: 10-12 servings
